_meta.description: ARIA — Deliberation Questions. Single source of truth. Merged aria_questions.json + ministers.json (deduplicated).

structure.by_ministry: Questions indexed by ARIA ministry — direct routing
structure.transversal_pool: Questions without assigned ministry — routing via keywords or AI

usage.board_game: Local routing via keywords (field 'keywords' in base_agents.json)
usage.ia_mode: Automatic routing by AI based on question content
usage.duplicate_filter: Check against chronolog before proposing an already debated question
